name: bagbak
summary: Yet another frida based App decryptor. Requires jailbroken iOS device and frida.re

documentation.readme: Yet another frida based App decryptor. Requires jailbroken iOS device and frida.re
usage_sections: UnFairPlay (with a tweak, it also works on jailbroken iOS)
all (default) — full IPA with all binaries decrypted
main (alias: app) — decrypt main app binary only

arguments.name: --device
arguments.description: connect to device with the given ID

arguments.name: --host
arguments.description: connect to remote frida-server on HOST

arguments.name: -o
arguments.description: ipa filename or directory to dump to

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: ipa filename or directory to dump to

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --version
arguments.description: Print the tool version and exit.

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with ChiChou/etoolbox (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zynon/LdapRelayScan (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zodiacon/HookHunter (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the IPA decryption and repackaging category. Fits when the engagement needs: Yet another frida based App decryptor. Requires jailbroken iOS device and frida.re.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Yet another frida based App decryptor. Requires jailbroken iOS device and frida.re.
documentation.how_to_use: Clone or install `bagbak` from its upstream repository, then run `bagbak --help` (or the README entrypoint) to confirm flags. Yet another frida based App decryptor. Requires jailbroken iOS device and frida.re.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.

use_cases: When you need IPA decryption and repackaging, use bagbak because Yet another frida based App decryptor. Requires jailbroken iOS device and frida.re.
When chaining IPA decryption and repackaging tools, pair bagbak with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bagbak --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
